title: nie-bot: BotEvent (NDJSON) + BotCommand (stdin JSON) types
description:
What: Define BotEvent NDJSON output enum and BotCommand stdin input enum.

Algorithm:
1. Create bot/src/io_types.rs with:
   BotEvent:
   - #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)] #[serde(tag="type", rename_all="snake_case")]
   - Variants: Connected{relay_url,pub_id,ts}, Disconnected{reason,ts}, Reconnecting{delay_secs,ts}, MessageReceived{from,text,message_id,ts}, UserJoined{pub_id,nickname,ts}, UserLeft{pub_id,ts}, PaymentRequest{session_id,from,chain,amount_zatoshi,ts}, ScriptOutput{command,exit_code,stdout,ts}, Error{reason,ts}
   - pub fn emit(event: &BotEvent) -> Result<()> — serde_json::to_string + println!; must be atomic per line

   BotCommand:
   - #[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize)] #[serde(tag="cmd", rename_all="snake_case")]
   - Variants: Send{text: String}, SetNickname{nickname: String}, Whoami, Users, Quit
   - pub async fn read_next() -> Result<Option<BotCommand>> — reads one line from tokio::io::stdin, returns None on EOF

Defensive:
- emit() writes exactly one line (no embedded newlines in serialized JSON; serde escapes them automatically)
- read_next(): EOF returns Ok(None), not Err; malformed JSON returns Err (caller emits Error event and continues)
- ts field is always UTC ISO-8601: chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339()

Agent team: I (implementer). V (validator) runs cargo build + tests.
Tests: BotEvent::MessageReceived serializes to expected JSON with type field; BotCommand::Send roundtrips; EOF on stdin returns None
acceptance_criteria: BotEvent serializes with correct type tag; BotCommand deserializes from JSON; unit tests pass
